arts.ttl: Vini Jr. passes 100 goals for Real Madrid
arts.sum: Vini Jr. passed the 100-goal mark with Real Madrid . Since opening his Madridista account against Valladolid in the 2018/19 campaign, Vini Jr. has been instrumental with his goals in the 14 trophies he has won.

“ Champions League matches are always going to be tough and we always have to have the same mentality as today: score a lot of goals and win. I'm confident and pleased to score again and help the team.

arts.ttl: Player Ratings: Real Madrid 5-1 Red Bull Salzburg; 2025 Champions League
arts.sum: Played right back for the final 20 minutes of the game and looked comfortable in that position, getting forward effectively and picking the right pass. The second Rodrygo goal was courtesy of a Bellingham backheel pass.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid post record revenue over €1 billion
arts.sum: Real Madrid have become the first club to record over €1 billion in annual revenue in the Deloitte Football Money League, the consulting firm said on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Is Rodrygo the most underrated player in the Champions League?
arts.sum: With three LaLiga titles, two Champions Leagues and a goal every two-and-a-half games, Rodrygo deserves far more plaudits than he gets.

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Real Madrid 5 - 1 RB Salzburg, Post-game, Champions League 2024 - 2025
arts.sum: On this episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani and Siddharth Ramsundar discuss: Kiyan and Sid break down a big win in the Champions League as Real Madrid decimate Salzburg at the Bernabeu

arts.ttl: WhoScored's European Team of the Week: Kylian Mbappe, Phil Foden, Trevoh Chalobah, Jeremy Doku
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe is the European Player of the Week following a Player of the Match showing against Las Palmas at the weekend. Montpellier, Liverpool, Chelsea, Leganes, Fulham, Manchester City, Rennes an...

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham matches Lionel Messi's Champions League record but loses out to Kylian Mbappe, Erling Haaland
arts.sum: Real Madrid's Jude Bellingham matches Lionel Messi's Champions League record but is still short of Erling Haaland and Kylian Mbappe.

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham equals Lionel Messi Champions League record after starring in Real Madrid's 5-1 win over Red Bull Salzburg
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham has equalled one of Lionel Messi 's legendary Champions League records after playing a starring role in Real Madrid 's 5-1 win over RB Salzburg.

arts.ttl: Three observations from Real Madrid’s 5-1 win vs RB Salzburg
arts.sum: It made me wonder — how close is this starting XI to Real Madrid’s best XI when it comes to keeping the ball, injured players aside? There have been doubts all season about whether Real Madrid’s multi-talented quartet of Rodrygo, Jude Bellingham, Vinicius Jr and Kylian Mbappe would work or not.
